channel.title: The Grant Desk - Tech & Infrastructure, EU, added in last 30 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Tech & Infrastructure, EU, added in last 30 days.

item.title: SIDN fonds: Pioneer Projects for a Strong Internet (rolling, Netherlands)
item.description:
Organisation: SIDN fonds

Location: Netherlands. Open to natural persons and legal entities for the pioneer track; theme calls require legal entities.

Award: Up to EUR 10,000 per pioneer project; theme calls (once or twice a year) fund larger projects above EUR 10,000. No application fee.

Duration: Pioneer projects develop an idea into a demo, pilot or experimental design; continuous intake.

Deadline: Rolling / undated

SIDN fonds (the foundation behind the .nl domain registry) invests in daring projects with societal added value that contribute to a strong internet and strong internet users. The Pioneers track is continuously open and awards up to EUR 10,000 to develop an innovative idea into a demo, pilot or experimental design; it is open to both individuals and legal entities. Larger projects are funded through theme calls issued once or twice a year (legal entities only). Projects must show innovation and public value and share their results openly; plain website or app building and purely B2B proposals are excluded. No application fee.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
